content.question: What proportion of small village school closures/suspensions are permanent versus genuinely temporary, and how many have been reversed through political intervention or community organizing since the 2013 centralization?
content.reduction_path: Request comprehensive data from school district centers on closure/suspension decisions, their stated duration, and actual reversal/reopening outcomes over 2013–2026; cross-reference with municipal records and NGO monitoring of rural education access; distinguish between administrative reversal and legislative policy change.
